encryptionRecovery.title: Manage Encryption
encryptionRecovery.description: Back up, restore, unlock, or reset your encryption key.
encryptionRecovery.alert.keyRequiredBody: This browser cannot currently decrypt your encrypted messages. Restore, unlock, or reset your key to continue.
encryptionRecovery.alert.lockedBody: Restore or unlock your encryption key to read encrypted messages on this device.

encryptionRecovery.fields.backupPassword: Used to encrypt the backup file
encryptionRecovery.fields.restoreBackupP: The password you created when backing up your key on iPhone

encryptionRecovery.fields.resetDevicePas: Create a passcode for the new encryption key on this device.

encryptionRecovery.errors.resetFailed: Could not reset encryption. Please try again.
encryptionRecovery.errors.restoreFailed: Could not restore your encryption key. Check your backup and password.
encryptionRecovery.errors.unlockFailed: Could not unlock your encryption key. Check your passcode and try again.
encryptionRecovery.confirm.reset:
Reset encryption for this account?

Older encrypted messages may become unreadable unless you restore the original key later.
encryptionRecovery.resetDescription: This generates a new encryption key for your account. Older encrypted messages may become unreadable unless you restore the original key later.
encryptionRecovery.danger.title: Start fresh encryption
encryptionRecovery.danger.body: This creates a new encryption key. Older encrypted messages may become unreadable unless you restore the original key later.
encryptionRecovery.simpleDescription: Use your device passcode or restore a backup to unlock encrypted messages.
encryptionRecovery.restoreDescription: Restore your encrypted chat key from a backup protected by your backup password.

wireless.title: Chatforia Wireless
wireless.description: Manage your Chatforia mobile plan, numbers, forwarding, and number porting.
wireless.options.heading: Choose how you want to use Chatforia

wireless.esim.body: Generate or open your eSIM QR code and follow the activation instructions on your phone.

esim.instructions.step2: Choose Add eSIM or Scan QR Code.
esim.instructions.step3: Scan this QR code and follow the on-screen steps to finish activation.

premium.heading: Go Premium
upgrade.plans.free.title: Free
upgrade.plans.free.desc: Start messaging for free. Ideal if you’re just trying Chatforia.
upgrade.plans.free.features.media: Share photos, voice messages, and short videos
upgrade.plans.free.features.ai: AI-powered smart replies and instant translation (fair use)
upgrade.plans.plus.title: Plus
upgrade.plans.plus.desc: All the essentials, without ads. Great for everyday messaging and calling.
upgrade.plans.premiumMonthly.title: Premium (Monthly)
upgrade.plans.premiumMonthly.desc: The full Chatforia experience: AI power tools, customization, and priority support.
upgrade.plans.premiumMonthly.features.ai: Premium-only AI power tools for rewrites, smart replies, and summaries
upgrade.plans.premiumAnnual.title: Premium (Annual)
upgrade.plans.premiumAnnual.desc: Save more when billed yearly — including extra color themes, AI tools, and priority support.
upgrade.plans.premiumAnnual.features.bes: Best for power users, remote workers, and heavy travelers
upgrade.plans.premiumAnnual.ctaPublic: Save 30% with annual – continue to login
upgrade.plans.premiumAnnual.disclaimer: Billed upfront. Cancel anytime. No hidden fees.
upgrade.mobile.disclaimer.devices: eSIM data packs require an eSIM-compatible and unlocked device. Availability varies by phone model, carrier, and country. Coverage and speeds vary by region.
upgrade.mobile.packs.5gb.title: {{scope}} 5 GB
upgrade.mobile.packs.10gb.title: {{scope}} 10 GB
upgrade.mobile.packs.unlimited.title: {{scope}} Unlimited
upgrade.mobile.region.localSubtitle: Best for staying connected in one country.
upgrade.mobile.region.europeSubtitle: Great for trips across supported European countries.
upgrade.family.medium.title: Family Medium
upgrade.family.medium.desc: Includes 40 GB of shared high-speed data — ideal for 3–5 active members.
upgrade.family.large.title: Family Large
upgrade.family.large.desc: Includes 80 GB of shared high-speed data — for power families that are always online.
upgrade.family.feature.shared: Shared data pool for your family
upgrade.family.feature.fairUse: Subject to fair-use policy and local limits
upgrade.why.title: Why people switch to Chatforia
upgrade.why.subtitle: Chatforia gives you a real phone number, smart translation, and a clear path to go ad-free when you’re ready.
upgrade.why.card.textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
upgrade.why.card.textnow.body: Lighter ads on Free, a simple Plus upgrade when you’re ready, and Premium tools TextNow doesn’t offer.
upgrade.why.card.voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
upgrade.why.card.voice.body: Modern app, global-first design, and built-in translation instead of old-school call forwarding.
upgrade.why.card.messengers.title: Chatforia vs chat apps
upgrade.why.card.messengers.body: Text real phone numbers — not just other app users — with AI and status built in. Great if you’re coming from apps like TextFree or TextMe.
upgrade.why.disclaimer: Comparison based on publicly available information and may change over time. Other free-texting apps like TextFree or TextMe are generally similar to TextNow.
upgrade.esim.local.5.title: Local 5 GB
upgrade.esim.local.10.title: Local 10 GB
upgrade.esim.local.20.title: Local 20 GB
upgrade.esim.local.unlimited.title: Local Unlimited
upgrade.esim.local.unlimited.desc: Unlimited data for heavy Chatforia use across your selected country, subject to fair-use and local network availability.
upgrade.esim.europe.3.title: Europe 3 GB
upgrade.esim.europe.3.desc: 3 GB of one-time eSIM data for Chatforia use across supported European countries.
upgrade.esim.europe.5.title: Europe 5 GB
upgrade.esim.europe.5.desc: 5 GB of one-time eSIM data for Chatforia use across supported European countries.
upgrade.esim.europe.10.title: Europe 10 GB
upgrade.esim.europe.10.desc: 10 GB of one-time eSIM data for Chatforia use across supported European countries.
upgrade.esim.europe.20.title: Europe 20 GB
upgrade.esim.europe.20.desc: 20 GB of one-time eSIM data for Chatforia use across supported European countries.
upgrade.esim.europe.unlimited.title: Europe Unlimited
upgrade.esim.europe.unlimited.desc: Unlimited data for heavy Chatforia use across supported European countries, subject to fair-use and local network availability.
upgrade.esim.global.10.title: Global 10 GB
upgrade.esim.global.20.title: Global 20 GB

family.invite.expiryHint: This link expires after a few days. You can always create a new one.

family.join.success: You have joined this family. You now share their data pool.
family.join.error: We could not add you to this family. The invite may be invalid or expired.
randomChat.title: Random Chat
randomChat.subtitle: Meet someone new instantly, or choose to chat with Ria.
randomChat.description: Chat anonymously first. Add Friend later if it feels right.
randomChat.setAge: Set your age range in Profile → Age & Random Chat to be matched with people.

support.heading: How can we help?
support.contactIntro: We’ll try to resolve this instantly. If not, our team will follow up.
support.sent: Message sent. We’ll reply by email.
support.sendError: Could not send. Email support@chatforia.com instead.
support.actionFailed: Could not complete that action. Please try again.
support.ticketCreated: We couldn’t resolve this automatically. Our team will follow up.
support.escalationMessage: We couldn’t resolve this automatically. Our team will follow up.
support.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
support.resolvedInstantly: Issue resolved instantly — no ticket needed.
howItWorks.title: How Chatforia Works
howItWorks.intro: Chatforia is designed to make communication simple, fast, and accessible. Getting started takes just a few steps.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up using your email or username to create your Chatforia account.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Connect with others by selecting contacts or starting new chats.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Messages are delivered quickly to provide a smooth communication experience.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Built-in translation helps users communicate across different languages.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Manage your preferences, contacts, and communication settings.
safety.title: Safety & Community Guidelines
safety.intro: Chatforia is committed to maintaining a safe and respectful environment for all users. These guidelines help ensure a positive experience for everyone.
safety.respectDesc: Users are expected to communicate respectfully. Harassment, abuse, or harmful behavior is not permitted.
safety.tools.block: Block users to prevent further interaction
safety.enforcementDesc: We may take action against accounts that violate these guidelines, including warnings, restrictions, or permanent removal from the platform.
blog.whyMessaging.speedDesc: One of the main advantages of messaging platforms is their speed. Messages are delivered instantly, allowing users to communicate in real time. This level of convenience has made messaging the preferred method of communication for many people.
blog.whyMessaging.globalDesc: Messaging platforms connect people across the globe. With internet access, users can communicate regardless of location, making it easier to build relationships and collaborate internationally.
blog.chatSafely.personalInfo.title: Protect Your Personal Information
blog.chatSafely.safetyFeatures.title: Use Built-In Safety Features
blog.chatSafely.scams.title: Be Aware of Scams
blog.chatSafely.responsibly.title: Communicate Responsibly
blog.chatSafely.whySafety.title: Why Online Safety Matters
blog.chatSafely.conclusion: Staying safe online doesn’t require advanced technical knowledge—just awareness, caution, and good judgment. With the right habits, you can communicate confidently and securely.
advertise.why.deals: Direct deals or programmatic via AdSense/Google Ads
privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro.body: This Privacy Policy explains how Chatforia (“we”, “us”) collects, uses, and shares information when you use our apps and services. We design Chatforia to minimize the data we can access.
privacyPolicy.infoWeCollect.title: Information we collect
privacyPolicy.infoWeCollect.account: Account info (e.g., email/phone) to create and secure your account.
privacyPolicy.infoWeCollect.encrypted: Encrypted content (messages/calls) is end-to-end encrypted; we can’t read it.
privacyPolicy.infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagnostic/usage like crash logs, device type, or coarse analytics to improve performance.
privacyPolicy.sms.title: Mobile phone numbers and SMS
privacyPolicy.sms.body: If you choose to provide a mobile phone number, we use it to enable features such as account verification, login alerts, and user-to-user messaging via SMS where supported. We may send transactional SMS messages related to your account and activity on Chatforia. You can opt out of receiving SMS messages at any time by replying with a supported opt-out keyword (such as “STOP”) or by changing your notification preferences in the app. We do not sell your phone number or use it for unrelated marketing.
privacyPolicy.sms.addRecipient: Add a recipient above to start…
privacyPolicy.howWeUse.title: How we use information
privacyPolicy.howWeUse.provide: Provide and secure the service (auth, spam/abuse detection).
privacyPolicy.sharing.title: Sharing
privacyPolicy.sharing.body: We don’t sell personal data. We may share limited data with processors (e.g., push notifications, analytics) under strict contracts.
privacyPolicy.rights.title: Your rights
privacyPolicy.rights.body: Depending on your region (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), you may request access, correction, deletion, or opt-out of certain processing. Contact: privacy@chatforia.com.
privacyPolicy.retention.title: Data retention & security
privacyPolicy.retention.body: We retain only what’s needed to operate the service and apply industry-standard security. E2E content can’t be decrypted by us.
privacyPolicy.children.title: Children
privacyPolicy.children.body: Chatforia isn’t directed to children under 13 (or as required by your local law).
privacyPolicy.changes.title: Changes
privacyPolicy.changes.body: We’ll post updates here and revise the “Last updated” date.
privacyPolicy.contact.title: Contact
privacyPolicy.contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA
terms.accounts.title: Accounts
terms.acceptableUse.title: Acceptable use
terms.acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: No illegal, abusive, or infringing content; no spam or automated abuse.
terms.sms.title: SMS communications
terms.changes.title: Changes
terms.changes.body: We may update these terms; continued use after changes means acceptance.
terms.contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA
